headline: 70 Dividend Aristocrats Face Their Mid-2026 Test: NOBL’s 2% Yield Under Pressure
summary: Seventy companies have raised their dividends through every recession and rate shock for at least a quarter century, but a bruising few quarters for some of NOBL's most-watched names put that unbroken record under real pressure heading into mid-2026.

raw.headline: 70 Dividend Aristocrats Face Their Mid-2026 Test: NOBL’s 2% Yield Under Pressure
raw.summary: Seventy companies have raised their dividends through every recession and rate shock for at least a quarter century, but a bruising few quarters for some of NOBL's most-watched names put that unbroken record under real pressure heading into mid-2026.

headline: ETF Showdown: ARKG vs GNOM, Which Genomics Fund Wins?
summary: Two genomics ETFs share the same buzzwords on every screener, but their structures have sent them on wildly different paths through rate shocks, biotech meltdowns, and the current rally. The one that looks riskier on paper may actually be the smarter satellite bet right now.

raw.headline: ETF Showdown: ARKG vs GNOM, Which Genomics Fund Wins?
